articles.title: Scientists Turn Ordinary Sunlight Into UV Light in Major Energy Breakthrough - SciTechDaily
articles.description: Sunlight just got an upgrade: Scientists have developed a material that converts ordinary sunshine into UV light, opening new possibilities for solar-powered technologies.
articles.content: A new solid-state material from Kyushu University turns visible light into high-energy UV at sunlight intensity. By attaching alkyl chains to the sp3 carbon atoms of an organic molecule, the research… [+5991 chars]
